findings.description: Architecture briefs for production data pipelines at final stage are expected to include a security section covering authentication, authorization, and encryption. None exists.
findings.evidence: Document sections: Overview, Architecture Components, Performance Characteristics, Operational Notes, Conclusions. No security section. Referenced as 'Section 6' which does not exist.
findings.suggestion: Add a Security section covering: authentication method, authorization model, encryption in transit, encryption at rest.

findings.description: 'Standard retry policy' is not actionable for engineers implementing or troubleshooting this stage. The actual policy parameters are required.
findings.evidence: "Transformation applies the standard retry policy on transient failures." — no policy defined anywhere.
findings.suggestion: Define inline: max attempts, backoff strategy (linear/exponential), timeout.

findings.description: Performance figures presented without benchmark methodology, environment, or date. Production architecture briefs should include benchmark context.
findings.evidence: "Benchmarks show that batch processing is 3× faster than streaming for files under 10MB." — no test conditions cited.
findings.suggestion: Add benchmark context: test environment, payload characteristics, date.
